sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61149" key="*kufari/ssinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κῠφᾰρίσσ-ινος</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κυπ</itype>-, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1588.7</biblScope> </bibl> (Aegina, <date TEIform="date">v B.C.</date>).</entryFree>
